mapper.select: select place_id as placeId, name as name, place_type as placeType from place where name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by name asc limit 10

select distinct p.place_id as placeId, p.name as name, p.place_type as placeType from reservation r join place p on p.place_id = r.place_id where r.member_id = #{memberId} and r.status = 'PAID' and p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by p.name asc limit 10
select pl.member_id from post p join place pl on p.place_id = pl.place_id where p.post_id = #{postId}
